creator: never@nevermind.kiev.ua
text:
Hello, Marcus I. Ryan!

On Fri, Jan 04, 2002 at 09:10:02AM -0800, you wrote:

> >Synopsis:       www/mod_php4 broken with iconv
> FreeBSD <hostname> 4.4-RELEASE FreeBSD 4.4-RELEASE #0: Mon Dec 31 14:02:36 CST 2001     <user@hostname>:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  i386
> >Description:
> When compiling ports/www/mod_php4 (4.1.1_0 - CVS from 1/4/2001@11:00am) with iconv support, mod_php4 compiles but when trying to restart apache it reports:
> 
> Cannot load /usr/local/libexec/apache/libphp4.so into server: /usr/local/libexec/apache/libphp4.so: Undefined symbol "iconv_module_entry"
> 
> Taking iconv out of the compile options "fixes" the problem.  Does not matter whether any other modules are compiled in.
I think it is the same bug I've experienced:
http://bugs.php.net/bug.php?id=14423


-- 
NEVE-RIPE
